title: Oceans in Asia smash heat records — what it means for extreme weather
summary:
Nature, Published online: 17 June 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01938-2

Report shows region is particularly vulnerable to the effects of climate change.
body: Nature, Published online: 17 June 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01938-2 Report shows region is particularly vulnerable to the effects of climate change.

title: El Niño is officially here, and will be among the strongest ever recorded, NOAA announces
summary: The National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration gives the climate event a 63% chance to "rank among the largest El Niño events in the historical record going back to 1950."
